Body.Content:
In the Teams admin center, admins can now modify, review, and apply configuration settings to Android devices without overriding other settings ensuring only the desired changes are made.

GA date: July CY2025
Body.Markdown:
In the Teams admin center, admins can now modify, review, and apply configuration settings to Android devices without overriding other settings ensuring only the desired changes are made.

GA date: July CY2025

Details.Name: Summary
Details.Value: In the Teams admin center, admins can now modify, review, and apply configuration settings to Android devices without overriding other settings ensuring only the desired changes are made.

Details.Name: CloudInstances
Details.Value: DoD, GCC, GCC High, Worldwide (Standard Multi-Tenant)

message.Title: Microsoft Teams: Apply partial settings for Android devices using configuration profiles in the Teams admin center
